overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man showing the character walking through wet New York City streets at night. The clip features urban residential architecture, street lighting, scattered pedestrians, and light vehicle traffic including a police van and emergency vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban residential sidewalk with parked vehicles and storefronts

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man walks steadily along the sidewalk, passing pedestrians and a parked white sedan on the left

entered.detail: Multi-story red brick residential building with white window frames
Silver sedan parked along the curb
Classic NYC street lamp casting warm orange light
Deciduous trees with autumn foliage lining the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a wet city sidewalk at night, passing a parked white sedan and scattered pedestrians. The street is lined with classic brick apartment buildings and illuminated by warm street lamps reflecting off the damp pavement.

events.description: passes blue USPS mailbox and approaches street intersection
traffic light changes from red to green, Spider-Man begins crossing the street

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crosses the street at a crosswalk, navigating between pedestrians and waiting for the light to change

notable_agents.action: white sedan waiting at the red light at the intersection

entered.detail: Standard blue United States Postal Service collection box
White striped pedestrian crossing on asphalt
Overhead traffic signal showing red then green
Modern glass facade building visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man passes a blue USPS mailbox and approaches an intersection. As the traffic light changes from red to green, he crosses the street among other pedestrians, with a white sedan waiting at the light and modern glass buildings visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined urban sidewalk with postal mailboxes

events.description: police van drives past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: continues walking down the sidewalk past a cluster of mailboxes as a police van passes by on the street

notable_agents.action: NYPD police van driving down the street from left to right

entered.detail: White NYPD emergency van with blue stripes
Multiple blue postal mailboxes lined up on the sidewalk
Contemporary high-rise building with illuminated windows
Green painted metal posts along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Walking along a tree-lined sidewalk, Spider-Man passes a cluster of USPS mailboxes as a police van drives by on the street. The environment features more abundant street trees and green bollards, with modern office buildings visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street approaching intersection with emergency vehicle

events.description: Spider-Man crosses the street at crosswalk with fire truck visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walks along the sidewalk and crosses the final intersection near a parked emergency vehicle

entered.detail: Red emergency vehicle with lights parked at the intersection ahead
Classic yellow NYC taxi cab parked along the curb
Older stone facade building with steps leading to entrance

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, Spider-Man walks toward an intersection where a red fire truck is parked. He crosses the street at the crosswalk, passing a yellow taxi and stone apartment buildings, with wet pavement reflecting the city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a wet New York City neighborhood that shifts from classic residential brick architecture to a more modern urban intersection. It begins with Spider-Man walking along a damp sidewalk lined with brick apartment buildings, where warm street lamps reflect off the pavement beside a parked white sedan. As he approaches an intersection, the camera follows him past a blue USPS mailbox and across the street among pedestrians while modern glass buildings emerge in the distance. The scene then shifts toward a more tree-lined stretch of sidewalk featuring green bollards and a passing police van, with the backdrop transitioning into towering office structures. Finally, the camera tracks him toward a final crosswalk where he passes a yellow taxi and a parked red fire truck, moving past stone apartment buildings under the glow of city lights reflecting on the wet ground.
